'''sayogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enabler|enabler]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enabler|enabler]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sayogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæyegeth|sæyegeth]] || [[word:sæyegej|sæyegej]] || [[word:sæyegesh|sæyegesh]] || [[word:sæyege|sæyege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sayoyogoth|sayoyogoth]] || [[word:sayoyogoj|sayoyogoj]] || [[word:sayoyogosh|sayoyogosh]] || [[word:sayoyogo|sayoyogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sayogoth|sayogoth]] || [[word:sayogoj|sayogoj]] || [[word:sayogosh|sayogosh]] || [[word:sayogo|sayogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sayofgoth|sayofgoth]] || [[word:sayofgoj|sayofgoj]] || [[word:sayofgosh|sayofgosh]] || [[word:sayofgof|sayofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sayogotho|sayogotho]] || [[word:sayogojo|sayogojo]] || [[word:sayogosho|sayogosho]] || [[word:sayogoko|sayogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sayogoth|sayogoth]] || [[word:sayogoj|sayogoj]] || [[word:sayogosh|sayogosh]] || [[word:sayogo|sayogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sayogothol|sayogothol]] || [[word:sayogojol|sayogojol]] || [[word:sayogoshol|sayogoshol]] || [[word:sayogokol|sayogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sayogothotho|sayogothotho]] || [[word:sayogojojo|sayogojojo]] || [[word:sayogoshosho|sayogoshosho]] || [[word:sayogoko|sayogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sayogothon|sayogothon]] || [[word:sayogojon|sayogojon]] || [[word:sayogoshon|sayogoshon]] || [[word:sayogokon|sayogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sayogothoro|sayogothoro]] || [[word:sayogojoro|sayogojoro]] || [[word:sayogoshoro|sayogoshoro]] || [[word:sayogokoro|sayogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
